name: Ranger Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Rice Cereal; Crisp (e.g., Rice Krispies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar, granulated sugar, and butter until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract to the creamed mixture; beat well.
3. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until just combined.
5. Mix in the crisp rice cereal, coconut flakes, and chopped dates.
6. Form the dough into 3/4-inch balls and place them about 2 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Allow cookies to cool slightly before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 5 dozen cookies.
